visual_bible: VISUAL BIBLE — 9 Particles: Physics Predicted and Whether They've Been Found. COMPOSITE ART STYLE: Photorealistic deep space photography background with flat 2D cartoon illustration overlay. BACKGROUND: Deep navy to black space, visible purple-pink nebula clouds concentrated at upper/lateral frame edges, dense cold white star field throughout, faint clockwise-spiral galaxy ghost visible in upper portions — intensity varies per segment emotional tone. CARTOON LAYER PALETTE: golden yellow, coral red, violet purple, warm orange, clean white. PARTICLE VISUAL VOCABULARY: Neutrino = tiny translucent oval with dashed bold outline, barely-there; Electron = small clean white cartoon sphere with bold outline; Positron = coral red electron-shape with thin white halo ring; Up quark = electric blue cartoon sphere; Down quark = coral red sphere; Gluon = thick squiggly warm-orange line binding quarks; Proton = triangle of 2 blue + 1 red quark spheres bound by gluon lines; Higgs boson = golden yellow sphere with warm outer glow halo; W boson = teal sphere; Z boson = violet sphere; Top quark = amber sphere; Graviton = translucent sphere with dashed dotted outline (hypothetical — never solid). SCIENTIST STICK FIGURES: large round white head, solid black dot eyes, white rectangular torso (lab coat), stick limbs, ~12% frame height, ALWAYS at frame edges never center. NEVER USE: Text overlays, date labels, holographic displays, realistic human faces, gradients inside cartoon shapes, neon glow without bold outline containment, anime-style eyes.
